channel.title: Upcoming OECD Publication Embargoes and Launches
channel.description: A list of dates and publications

item.title: Chemical content validation of recycled plastics
item.description: Chemical content validation of recycled plastics by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Monday 13 April 2026 at 8:30.
item.oe:directorate: Environment Directorate

item.title: Participation of third-country bidders in the EU procurement market
item.description: Participation of third-country bidders in the EU procurement market by Directorate for Public Governance has an embargo on Wednesday 15 April 2026 at 0:01.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Public Governance

item.title: Policies for the Future of Farming and Food in Romania
item.description: Policies for the Future of Farming and Food in Romania by Trade and Agriculture Directorate has an embargo on Wednesday 15 April 2026 at 9:00.
item.oe:directorate: Trade and Agriculture Directorate

item.title: OECD Secretary-General Tax Report to G20 Finance Ministers and Central Bank Governors (G20 United States, April 2026)
item.description: OECD Secretary-General Tax Report to G20 Finance Ministers and Central Bank Governors (G20 United States, April 2026) by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Thursday 16 April 2026 at 14:00.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Tax Policy and Administration

item.title: Rapport sur la fiscalité du Secrétaire général de l’OCDE à l’intention des ministres des Finances et des gouverneurs de banque centrale du G20 (G20 États-unis, avril 2026)
